productDisplayName: United Colors of Benetton Women Solid Grey Tops
description: CompositionGrey blouson top made of 100% viscose, has a round neck, three-quarter dolman sleeves with ribbed cuffs, applique work on the left chest and sleeve, and has a broad hemFittingRegularWash careDelicate machine wash coldDo not bleach, scrub, wring or tumble dryHang dry in shadeWarm ironClassic and cosy, this grey blouson top from united colors of benetton is a great addition to your winter wardrobe. Created using viscose fabric, this top is all set to keep you warm with the ribbed cuffs and broad hem that sits perfect on the waist, and flatter your silhouette with ease. Pair it with jeans, sports shoes and long earrings, throw over a jacket-styled cardigan and you're all set to take the streets by storm.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in topsHeight: 5'7"; Chest: 33"
